/* ====== HISTORY ====== */ .history { margin-top: 25px; border-top: 2px solid #e2e8f0; padding-top: 15px; } .history-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px; } .history-header h3 { font-size: 16px; color: #1e293b; } .clear-history { background-color: transparent !important; color: #ef4444 !important; font-size: 13px !important; padding: 5px 10px !important; border: 1px solid #ef4444 !important; border-radius: 5px; } .clear-history:hover { background-color: #fee2e2 !important; } #historyList { max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; } .history-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 8px 10px; margin: 5px 0; background-color: #f8fafc; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; } .history-expression { color: #64748b; } .history-result { font-weight: bold; color: #3b82f6; } .no-history { text-align: center; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 13px; padding: 10px; }
